raw_row.Education: MBA, Technology – The College of Santa Fe/Western States School of Banking (UNM); B.S.B.A. Business Administration & Management – Northern Arizona University; Graduate, Leadership New Mexico (2016).
raw_row.Skills and Achievements: Strategic planning, retail banking ops, deposit & loan growth, financial reporting, staff development, budgeting, marketing strategy, IT project leadership, community engagement, Adobe & Microsoft Office suite. Directed multi-state branches, managed multimillion-dollar budgets, chaired executive committees, and earned multiple “Best Bank” and business excellence awards.
raw_row.Experience: Retail Banking Director (2007–17): led NM & CO branches, private banking, and deposit strategy; oversaw risk, HR, facilities, and financial reporting to board. Marketing & Communications Director (1993–2006): managed advertising, call center, product launches, brand strategy, and corporate image. Operations Manager (1986–93): project management, policy compliance, audits, teller ops manuals, and ATM profitability tracking.
